name: Titania Prime
description: Tempting and terrifying, this is Titania in her ultimate form.
passiveDescription: Titania generates Health for herself and nearby allies every time she casts an Ability.

abilities.name: Spellbind
abilities.description: Enemies fumble their weapons as they are whisked into the air. Nearby allies become immune to Status Effects. Hold the ability to cast the immunity onto Titania.

abilities.name: Tribute
abilities.description: Cycle through and extract one of the four Buffs when cast on an enemy. Thorns reduces incoming damage. Dust degrades enemy accuracy. Full Moon increases companion damage. Entangle slows enemies within range.

abilities.name: Lantern
abilities.description: Create a swarm of razorflies that transform an enemy into an irresistible floating beacon, attracting witless comrades before exploding on command.

abilities.name: Razorwing
abilities.description: Shrink down and take flight, while razorflies attack nearby enemies and amplify the damage they take.
